title: GenomeLens 点图
description: 用于把双物种锚点关系直观绘制成点图，帮助快速判断大片段保守、倒位、易位、串联重复或噪声分布，是检查共线性整体轮廓和数据质量的经典入口图。
description_en: Visualizes pairwise anchor relationships as a dotplot, helping users quickly inspect large conserved segments, inversions, translocations, tandem duplication patterns, and noise structure. It is the classic first-look figure for overall synteny structure and data quality.
context: 双物种宏观共线性结构与重排模式快速判读。
context_en: Rapid inspection of pairwise macro-synteny structure and rearrangement patterns.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含这对比较物种输入文件的目录。每个物种需按同名前缀成对提供 `BED + CDS/PEP` 或 `GFF/GTF + genome FASTA`；插件会自动识别可用组合，并据此恢复点图所需的染色体坐标轴与物种背景。
params.description_en: Directory containing the input files for the species pair. Each species should be provided as a matched same-stem pair using either `BED + CDS/PEP` or `GFF/GTF + genome FASTA`. The plugin auto-detects the available combination and uses it to establish the coordinate axes and species context for the dotplot.

params.label: Anchors 文件
params.description: 双物种锚点文件，决定点图中每个同源落点的位置与分布格局，是判断共线性连续性和异常散点的核心输入。
params.description_en: Pairwise anchors file that determines the position and distribution of homologous points on the dotplot. It is the key input for judging synteny continuity and abnormal scatter patterns.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 点图输出目录。通常会在这里生成用于快速质检和结构判读的双物种点图文件。
params.description_en: Output directory for the dotplot. This is where the pairwise dotplot used for quick quality control and structural inspection is usually generated.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 点图画布尺寸，例如 `10x10`。当染色体数较多或希望放大局部结构时，可手动调整版面比例。
params.description_en: Figure size for the dotplot, for example `10x10`. This can be adjusted manually when many chromosomes are present or when you want to enlarge local structure.

params.label: 分辨率
params.description: 点图的栅格输出分辨率。更高的 DPI 有助于保留密集散点细节。
params.description_en: Raster output resolution for the dotplot. Higher DPI helps preserve detail in dense point distributions.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 点图输出格式。若需要后续放大、标注或排版，优先考虑矢量格式。
params.description_en: Dotplot output format. If you need to zoom, annotate, or typeset the figure later, vector formats are preferred.
